title: Important Announcement: Exam and Assignment Tracking
content:
Important Announcement: Exam and Assignment Tracking

Dear Students,

If a course exam is not listed in your academic calendar, it means that a written exam will not be administered for that course. However, an assignment may have been given instead. Please check the

STİX system

for details regarding such assignments.

To fulfill your academic responsibilities, we kindly remind you to regularly check your exam and assignment schedule. Please note that the published exam calendar is subject to change, so

make sure to follow the announcements

.

Wishing you success in your studies.

GENEL KURUL SINAV TAKVİMİ-TR.xlsx

GENEL YARIYIL SINAV TAKVİMİ-TR.xlsx
